title: ux-DateTimePicker
text: ux-DateTimePicker This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-DateTimePicker properties. ux-DateTimePicker Widget Note: ux-DateTimePicker follow the time format (12-hour/24-hour) configured in the user's system locale. Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-DateTimePicker Maps to physical widget: uxTextField of type datetime-local Default definition: ux-DateTimePicker=uxTextField(html:type=datetime-local) Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Fields of Uniface data types Date, Time, and DateTime.
